name: Python
description: Python via mise, with a configurable package/project manager (uv by default; poetry or none/pip supported). uv is installed from the official Astral release, poetry from its official installer.

version.description: Python version to install via mise. 'latest' resolves to the most recent stable, or pin to a major/full version.

packageManager.description: Default package/project manager. 'uv' (recommended) is the fast Rust-based manager from Astral. 'poetry' is the classic project manager. 'none' leaves you with bare pip from the Python install.

packageManagerVersion.description: Version pin for uv/poetry. 'latest' tracks the upstream installer default. Ignored when packageManager is 'none'.
